p2p_enrich.notes: CI Discovery: Repo is pytorch/pytorch with build-system using cmake/ninja. CI commands found: (1) lintrunner for linting (FLAKE8, CLANGFORMAT, PYFMT, RUFF, etc. from .lintrunner.toml), (2) python test/run_test.py for running tests via CI scripts (.ci/pytorch/run_tests.sh, .ci/pytorch/test.sh), (3) pytest not directly used - tests run via custom test runner. Both pass on base commit.
